scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix backend run start:dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.db:reset: npm --prefix backend exec prisma migrate reset
scripts.dev:clean: (pkill -f "npm run start:dev" || true) >/dev/null 2>&1 && (pkill -f "nest start --watch" || true) >/dev/null 2>&1 && (pkill -f "npm run dev -p 3001" || true) >/dev/null 2>&1 && (pkill -f "next dev" || true) >/dev/null 2>&1 && (lsof -ti -iTCP:4000 -iTCP:3001 -sTCP:LISTEN | xargs kill -9 || true) >/dev/null 2>&1 && npm run db:up && cd backend && npx prisma db push --force-reset --accept-data-loss && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db seed && cd .. && (pkill -f "npm run start:dev" || true) >/dev/null 2>&1 && (pkill -f "nest start --watch" || true) >/dev/null 2>&1 && (pkill -f "next dev" || true) >/dev/null 2>&1 && (lsof -ti -iTCP:4000 -iTCP:3001 -sTCP:LISTEN | xargs kill -9 || true) >/dev/null 2>&1 && concurrently "npm --prefix backend run start:dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.lint: npm --prefix backend run lint:check && npm --prefix frontend run lint
scripts.check: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
